raw.advertiser_name: マフィア・シティ-極道風雲

hook.summary: Dramatic reveal of the Narcos character El Patrón in a branded collaboration.
hook.visual_action: A dark silhouette transitions into a full-color portrait of Pablo Escobar against a blood-red background with smoke effects.
hook.text_overlay: EL PATRÓN ULTIMATE RENEGADE MAFIA CITY X NARCOS

scene_flow: Dramatic silhouette reveal of El Patrón with red atmospheric lighting and Narcos branding.
Full reveal of the character portrait with the 'Mafia City x Narcos' collaboration logo.
Transition to a 3D rendered scene showing a man and woman in a purple convertible driving through a mansion gate.
Final end card featuring the game logo and a 'Download for free' call to action.
audience_proxy: Adult males 18-45 who are fans of the Narcos series and enjoy crime-themed strategy games.
